key.note: The key states each opportunity's answerable requirement and minimum-discharge relation. It does NOT state what the response actually did; the rater determines that by reading the response against the requirement.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State who the policy covers (salaried engineering staff).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff confined to salaried engineering staff; partially-discharged-with-defect iff the covered population is broadened.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State the remote-day maximum (3/week) and condition (manager approval).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff both the cap and the condition are stated; undischarged iff either is missing.
discharged iff stated with the local-time qualifier; undischarged iff altered.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State the annual equipment stipend (600 units).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff 600 units/year is stated; undischarged iff altered.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: Contractor stipend eligibility is unstated; surface as unstated.
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff surfaced as unstated; partially-discharged-with-defect iff a contractor eligibility answer is invented.

response_artifact: Meridian Labs Remote-Work Policy revision C covers salaried engineering staff. It permits up to three remote days per week with manager approval. Core collaboration hours are 10:00-15:00 in the employee's local time zone. The annual equipment stipend is 600 currency units. The policy does not state whether contractors are eligible for the stipend.
source_packet: Meridian Labs Remote-Work Policy, revision C, applies to salaried engineering staff. Under revision C, employees may work remotely up to three days per week with manager approval. Core collaboration hours are 10:00-15:00 in the employee's local time zone. Equipment stipends are 600 currency units per year. The policy is silent on whether contractors are eligible for the stipend.
task_statement: Using only the source, answer: who the policy covers, the maximum remote days per week and any condition, the core collaboration hours, the annual equipment stipend, and whether contractors are eligible for the stipend.
